name: Hand-mechanism spacer (square)
notes: Small square. Glue note on Panel D: 'Glue piece 91 to cardboard 1mm thick' — represented here as material=cardboard-1mm. Per §II.D: pieces 91 and 92 'separate piece 4, the front center column, from the minute hand wheel and the reduction gear,' and piece 92a is then glued on top of 92+91 with axle holes coincident. The plain 'b' tab label on piece 91 (Panel D) presumably reciprocates with a 'b₉₁' subscripted zone on piece 4 or piece 92a — neither subscripted label is documented in Panel D's pieces 4/10/92 entries, so the connection is left empty pending M1 task 1.5 (Inkscape inspection) or M2 cross-plate sidecar work. The '+' center mark is the minute-hand axle — the same axle threads through pieces 92, 92a, and the minute-hand wheel (piece 75) per §II.D; that axle is shared with piece 92.
